RAG Test Document

This document is used by the automated test suite.

Key facts for retrieval tests:
- The capital of France is Paris.
- The author of this test document is the RAG Masterclass test suite.
- The sky is blue on a clear day.
- Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
- The test suite validates the RAG pipeline end-to-end.

This content is intentionally simple so that similarity search reliably retrieves it
when asked questions about France, Paris, or the test document.
